meta.title: platforms-v1 — Universal Plugin Framework
meta.description: ralplan consensus plan iter-3 APPROVED · DNA injection · whisper transport · pentagon parity

props.title: Universal Plugin Framework
props.subtitle: DNA injection · whisper transport · per-client pentagon parity

props.title: 1. Pentagon-only auto client set
props.content: claude-code, codex, opencode, pi run in auto lanes. cursor is manual/quarterly. VSCode explicitly out of scope.

props.title: 2. Single source of truth per concern
props.content: DNA canon amended in-place. No forked overlay definitions. No path-local exceptions (AGENTS.md §2.3).

props.title: 3. Contracts as executable documents
props.content: Capability manifests and parity contracts are enforced by registered DNA gates — not narrative docs.

props.title: 4. Flat workstream shape
props.content: .lev/pm/workstreams/<id>/state/workstream.yaml + captures/. 25/25 precedent preserved. No nested children.

props.title: 5. Cursor is manual-verified
props.content: Quarterly smoke refreshes last_verified_at. NOT in nightly pentagon-live. Per-tier staleness (30d auto / 90d cursor).

props.title: DD1 — Canon enforces promises
props.content: No orphan gates. Every plan-declared gate resolves in dna/gates.yaml before enforcement runs.

props.title: DD2 — Nightly cost bounded
props.content: Pentagon-live lane stays within p99 < 50ms per manifest write path.

props.title: DD3 — Unambiguous ownership
props.content: Executor never guesses filesystem location. One module owns each deliverable (AGENTS.md §2.2).

props.label: DELIVERABLES
props.title: Eight deliverables across three tiers
props.subtitle: Bootstrap (D0, D0.5, D0.6) → Core (D1, D2, D3) → Enforcement (D4, D5)

props.title: D0 · Module path bootstrap
props.content: Owner: plugins/platforms · NEW in iter-3. Manifests live at plugins/platforms/manifests/<client>.yaml. Schema at plugins/platforms/src/contracts/capability-manifest.ts. Option A (core/platforms/ scaffold) invalidated — duplicate ownership with existing @lev-os/platforms plugin.

props.title: D0.5 · DNA canon amendment
props.content: Owner: dna/ (shared) · NEW in iter-3. Amend dna/gates.yaml with 8 new gates (7 original + events-canon). Amend dna/testing.yaml with pentagon_clients: enum. Prerequisite to D4/D5 — without it, gates emit signal to no enforcer.

props.title: D0.6 · pi fixture lane bootstrap
props.content: Owner: plugins/platforms · NEW in iter-3. Create plugins/platforms/tests/fixtures/pentagon/pi/. Seed with hello-prompt.jsonl matching pi adapter I/O. No-op if fixtures already exist.

props.title: D1 · DNA static merge
props.content: Owner: core/config. Static merge at session start. Live overlay deferred to platforms-v2. Revisit trigger: p99 > 50ms × 3 nightly runs OR ≥2 workstreams request live overlay.

props.title: D2 · JSONL canonical whisper
props.content: Owner: core/event-bus. JSONL at ~/.local/state/lev/whisper/<session>.jsonl is canonical. Native adapters = optimization, MUST round-trip through JSONL. Resolves C2 Non-Commutation.

props.title: D3 · Flat workstream shape
props.content: Owner: core/workstream. state/workstream.yaml + captures/<phase>-<slug>.md. 25/25 precedent. Shard pattern rejected (premature generalization; 0/25 precedent).

props.title: D4 · Capability manifest
props.content: Owner: plugins/platforms. One YAML per client at plugins/platforms/manifests/<client>.yaml. Per-tier staleness: pentagon_auto 30d · cursor_manual 90d. Eliminates 3×/year cursor false positives.

props.title: D5 · Pentagon parity harness
props.content: Owner: plugins/platforms. Contract tests + golden fixture replay = CO-PRIMARY (both CI-blocking). Live matrix = nightly, release-blocking. Cursor fixtures under separate manual-smoke/ path.

props.label: PENTAGON
props.title: Per-client capability Venn
props.subtitle: 4 auto-tested clients + 1 manual quarterly. Harness bindings via D0.5 pentagon_clients enum.

props.label: TEST MATRIX
props.title: Full coverage — every cell has cmd + gate + predicate
props.subtitle: Commands use inline shell; repo-local tooling/scripts/ references eliminated (portability fix, F2 follow-up applied).

rows.predicate: Zod schema parses sample manifest; no core/platforms/ dir

rows.command: yq '.gates | keys' dna/gates.yaml | sort | diff - <(yq '.gates | keys' .plan-declared-gates.yaml | sort)
find .lev/pm/workstreams -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 3 -type d ! -name state ! -name captures ! -name decisions | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'

props.label: PRE-MORTEM
props.title: Four scenarios with mitigations
props.subtitle: Each scenario has failure · detection · mitigation · owner · threshold.

props.title: 1. DNA merge stampede
props.content: Failure: 200+ overlays at load blow p99. Detection: dna_merge_duration_ms p99 > 50ms. Mitigation: static merge only; Option B revisit trigger (3 nightly breaches). Owner: core/config. Threshold: 3 breaches → file platforms-v2-dna-live-overlay.

props.title: 2. Cursor staleness false positives — RESOLVED
props.content: Was: iter-2 single 30d SLO → cursor red-flagged 3×/year. Fix: per-tier map (auto 30d, manual 90d). Owner: plugins/platforms. Threshold: eliminated.

props.title: 3. Manifest drift
props.content: Failure: adapter I/O shape changes, manifest doesn't. Detection: capability-manifest-schema gate fails pre-commit. Mitigation: nightly pentagon-live refreshes last_verified_at; 14d warn / 30d red. Owner: plugins/platforms.

props.title: 4. pi model-vs-client confusion (NEW)
props.content: Failure: contributors assume pi = model only, skip pentagon harness enrollment. Detection: D0.5 pentagon_clients.pi absent → unit gate red. Mitigation: Principle 5 names adapter path; D0.6 seeds fixture lane. Owner: plugins/platforms. Threshold: 1 mismatch → CI red + needs-adr label.

props.label: ADR
props.title: Architecture Decision Record · platforms-v1 iter-3 final
Decision
props.content: Adopt pentagon-only auto client set (claude-code, codex, opencode, pi) with cursor manual/quarterly. Manifest contract owned by plugins/platforms with instances at plugins/platforms/manifests/<client>.yaml and schema at plugins/platforms/src/contracts/capability-manifest.ts. DNA canon (dna/gates.yaml + dna/testing.yaml) amended up-front (D0.5) BEFORE enforcement gates fire. JSONL whisper transport is canonical; native adapters are optimization. Flat workstream shape (25/25 precedent). Contract + golden = co-primary CI gate; live matrix = nightly.

rows.alternative: Scaffold core/platforms/ as new core module
rows.reason: duplicate ownership with existing @lev-os/platforms plugin; destructive migration
path does not exist; Critic iter-2 Edit 1

rows.alternative: Single 30d staleness SLO across all clients
rows.reason: contradicts quarterly cursor cadence; 3×/year false positives
adapter exists at plugins/platforms/src/adapters/pi.ts; pi IS a client surface
0/25 precedent; AGENTS.md names workstream.yaml as durable identity
LevEvent is payload-shaped, not transport-shaped; 4 bridges diverge
v2 via revisit trigger; C1 budget not yet declared

rows.alternative: Golden fixtures as sole D5 primary
rows.reason: fixtures test replay, not boundary; contract gate co-primary required

props.title: F1 — Add events-canon to D0.5 registration
props.content: D2 test matrix references gate events-canon but D0.5 registers only 7 gates. Append: events-canon — severity=error, trigger=pre-commit, owner=core/event-bus, scope=core/event-bus/**.

props.title: F2 — Replace repo-local scripts with inline commands
props.content: Smell noted: tooling/scripts/ is Lev-monorepo-local; plan ambition is any project. Replace D0.5 + D3 commands with portable inline shell (yq + find one-liners shown in test matrix). No new scripts. No D0.7 bootstrap.

props.title: F3 — Symmetric Option A re-open trigger
props.content: D1 Option B has explicit revisit trigger. D0 Option A (core/platforms/) permanence should parallel: if ≥3 non-plugin modules depend on CapabilityManifest within 6 months, re-open promotion ADR.

props.title: F4 — pi adapter subdir noted
props.content: plugins/platforms/src/adapters/pi/ exists with coordination.ts + notify.ts alongside pi.ts. Plan treats pi as single-file; executor should decide if subdir is richer surface or WIP to consolidate.

props.label: HISTORY
props.title: Consensus iteration log
props.subtitle: Planner → Architect → Critic, sequential per ralplan contract. Opus for all three roles.

items.title: Planner draft · Critic REJECT
items.description: 8 required edits: client-set substitution (Claude/Cursor/VSCode/Codex vs correct pentagon), D1 hybrid contract leak, D2 primary inversion, D3 shard premature generalization, D5 primacy inverted, C1/C2 risks, 3/5 both-avoidance, pre-mortem shallow, test matrix absent, no SLOs.

items.title: Planner revised · Critic ITERATE
items.description: 4 required edits: D0 bootstrap (core/platforms/ vapor), D0.5 substrate (gates unregistered in dna/gates.yaml), per-tier staleness SLO, pi status resolution.

items.title: Planner revised · Critic APPROVE
items.description: 3 textual follow-ups attached (events-canon gate, tooling/scripts smell, Option A symmetry). Plan architecturally settled; deliberate-mode compliant; executor handoff safe.

props.label: SUCCESS CRITERIA
props.title: Green gates required before workstream closes
All 8 deliverables green
props.content: D0, D0.5, D0.6, D1, D2, D3, D4, D5 all report green gates.

props.title: DNA canon registered
props.content: dna/gates.yaml contains every plan-declared gate; dna/testing.yaml pentagon_clients enumerates all 5 clients with correct tiers.

props.title: No orphan paths
props.content: No core/platforms/ directory exists. No orphan manifests outside plugins/platforms/manifests/.

props.title: Staleness thresholds applied
props.content: Cursor uses 90d; auto-tier uses 30d. Zero false-positive cursor alerts in rolling 12mo.

props.title: Pi fixture lane operational
props.content: plugins/platforms/tests/fixtures/pentagon/pi/ exists and passes golden replay on first nightly run.

props.title: ADR committed
props.content: Decision record at .lev/pm/workstreams/platforms-v1/decisions/adr-platforms-v1.md (durable canon, not .omc/ local-only).
